title: Loons' Vanilla Enhanced
description: 📦Loons' Vanilla Enhanced, is a modpack that stays true to the core of vanilla Minecraft, while making everything look and feel significantly better.
body:
![Loons' Vanilla Enhanced Banner Image!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f8fb2ee1c663c8178c14b1bca078ebd357611e1.png)

# A huge update is coming soon, in July of 2026!
## Upgrading from Alpha 2.0.1 to Beta 3.0.
That includes fixing visual glitches, huge customisable optimisation, improving visuals, and an updated mod, shader and resource pack list. Ontop of all that, the description and the gallery will be updated. As there are some inaccuracies to the actual modpack, shown in the description and gallery, pretty much it is hugely outdated.


## ✨**Key Features:**

- Fully enhanced player & mob animations
- Subtle visual upgrades that preserve the vanilla aesthetic
- Loads of optimization mods

### **🔧Main Mods/Resource Packs Applied:**
- Fresh Animations
- Detailed Animations x Just Expressions
- Hold My Items
- Colourful OreUI
- Easy Magic

## ⚙️**Performance Notes:**
--- Coming soon ---


## **📝Note:**
I have only created one resource pack in this modpack, the rest are created by amazing creators:

**My Created Resource pack:**
- [Colourful OreUI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/colouful-ore-ui)
